official_names.zh-Hans: 学生签证 / 进入许可

status_note_md.en: Hong Kong Immigration Department publishes entry arrangements for study. Separate rules apply for some nationalities and for Mainland, Macao, and Taiwan residents.
status_note_md.zh-Hans: 香港入境事务处公布以学习为目的的入境安排。部分国籍以及内地、澳门、台湾居民另有规则。

summary_md.en: The main Hong Kong study entry route for non-local students with a school acceptance letter for an eligible private school, full-time locally accredited post-secondary programme, exchange, or registered non-local course. Applicants must show they can pay fees and living costs without working or public funds. Hong Kong has no dedicated digital-nomad visa in this record; talent routes such as TTPS are separate.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 面向非本地学生的主要香港学习入境途径，须持有合资格私立学校、全日制本地认可专上课程、交换或已登记非本地课程的录取信，并能证明可支付学费与生活费且不靠工作或公共资金。本记录不将香港描述为提供专门数字游民签证；顶尖人才通等途径另行处理。

good_for_md.en: Students accepted into an eligible Hong Kong programme who can fund fees and living costs without working, and who need a dedicated study visa/entry permit.
good_for_md.zh-Hans: 适合获香港合资格课程录取、能在不工作的情况下支付学费与生活费，并需要专门学生签证/进入许可的学生。

not_good_for_md.en: Applicants without school acceptance, those seeking unrestricted work or a digital-nomad stay, or people already holding another status that allows study (check ImmD conditions). Public or aided school study is generally not permitted except listed exceptions.
not_good_for_md.zh-Hans: 不适合没有学校录取、寻求不受限制工作或数字游民停留，或已持其他允许学习身份者（须核对入境处条件）。除列明例外外，一般不可入读官立或资助学校。

note_md.en: ImmD sets age bands for primary (from 5 years 8 months to 11) and secondary (below 20). Post-secondary study is not limited by those school-age bands on the same page.
note_md.zh-Hans: 入境处对小学（5 岁 8 个月至 11 岁）和中学（20 岁以下）设有年龄范围。同页上的专上课程不受这些学龄段限制。

note_md.en: Requires acceptance for an eligible private school, full-time locally accredited post-secondary programme (including some part-time taught postgraduate local programmes), exchange within stated limits, or a full-time course on the Cap. 493 non-local course register.
note_md.zh-Hans: 须获合资格私立学校、全日制本地认可专上课程（包括部分兼读授课式研究院本地课程）、规定时限内的交换，或第 493 章非本地课程登记册上的全日制课程录取。

note_md.en: ImmD requires ability to meet course fees, living expenses, and accommodation without working and without recourse to public funds. Exact amounts are case- and programme-specific.
note_md.zh-Hans: 入境处要求能够支付学费、生活费与住宿，且不靠工作及公共资金。具体金额视个案与课程而定。

stability_requirement_md.en: The study route is funded by personal means, not employment income in Hong Kong; ImmD states maintenance without working.
stability_requirement_md.zh-Hans: 学习途径依赖自有资金而非在港就业收入；入境处说明须在不工作的情况下维持生活。

application_processing_time_md.en: ImmD publishes processing-time guidance on the study pages; times vary and should be checked when applying.
application_processing_time_md.zh-Hans: 入境处在学习页面公布处理时间指引；时长会变化，申请时应核对。

summary_md.en: A student visa/entry permit is temporary. Longer Hong Kong settlement, if any, depends on later employment or talent schemes such as IANG or TTPS under their own rules—not automatic from study alone.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 学生签证/进入许可是临时的。更长的香港定居（如有）取决于后续就业或 IANG、顶尖人才通等计划的自身规则，并非仅凭学习自动获得。

summary_md.en: ImmD study pages do not establish citizenship eligibility.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 入境处学习页面没有确认公民资格。

rationale_md.en: Core eligibility is clear on ImmD, but nationality carve-outs, work conditions after study, and fees need case-level checks.
rationale_md.zh-Hans: 入境处核心资格清楚，但国籍例外、毕业后工作条件与费用需按案件核对。
